title: Easier Mob Heads
description: Obtain vanilla mob heads using axe enchanted with Silk Touch
body:
Vanilla mechanic of obtaining Mob Heads using Charged Creepers is great for a challenging collectible trophy, but for general gameplay it is certainly _too much_.

This datapack attempts to fix it by giving you a chance to get a Mob Head by killing a mob using a **Silk Touch** enchanted **Axe**.

The base drop chance is **10%**, chance is increased by **20%** from **Sharpness I**,
Furthermore, chance is increased by **5%** for each Sharpness level, up to a total **50%** drop chance at **Sharpness V**.

This datapack only affects vanilla mobs and has no integration with Vanilla Tweaks's "More mob heads".

<details>
<summary>List of affected mobs</summary>

- Skeleton
- Creeper
- Zombie
- Piglin
- Ender Dragon (Note: the Ender Dragon head is guaranteed to drop on last hit with Silk Touch Axe, regardless of Sharpness levels)

</details>

This datapack does not affect Wither Skeletons, as their skulls already drop without charged creepers. For that you can try my other datapacks specifically for wither skeleton skulls:
- [BE Wither Skulls](https://modrinth.com/datapack/be-wither-skulls)
- [Wither Skull Barter](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wither-skull-barter)
